description: Content-hash dedup uses SHA-256 over source-of-truth user file bytes before any platform transform.

inputs.sourceDescription: 64-byte JPEG-like byte sequence with SOI, APP1/Exif marker, TIFF header, pseudo-random payload, and EOI.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: transformedTierBytesHash
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: The dedup hash must not be recomputed from EXIF-stripped, transcoded, tier-reencoded, thumbnail, or other platform-transformed bytes.
